Mémoire des Territoires.voice_instructions: Mature masculine French voice, aged around 55-60 years old, with the gravitas of a maritime worker or shipyard foreman. Speak with measured pace, respectful tone that honors the memory of shipyard workers. Slight regional accent reminiscent of French coastal industrial regions like Saint-Nazaire or Brest. Voice should convey both the industrial heritage and human dignity of naval workers' testimonies. Clear articulation with occasional pauses for reflection, as if recounting important historical memories.

chantiers_navals.voice_instructions: Professional documentary narrator, mature male voice around 55 years old, authoritative yet warm tone, clear articulation suitable for historical content about naval shipyards, measured pace with appropriate pauses for dramatic effect, French accent when speaking French
